title: ZoningDistrict
description: A NYC zoning district — the regulatory classification (residential R, commercial C, manufacturing M, plus special-purpose and overlay districts) governing use, bulk, and density on a lot. Defined and mapped by DCP; rendered in ZoLa and encoded per-lot in the NYC Zoning Tax Lot Database (fdkv-4t4z) and PLUTO.

kind.description: Whether this is a base zoning district, an overlay, or a special district.

description.description: Plain-language description of what the district permits.

specialDistrictName.description: Full name if a special-purpose district (spdist).

zoningMapNumber.description: DCP zoning map number where the district appears (zonemap).

zoningResolutionUrl.description: Link to the governing section of the NYC Zoning Resolution.
